message:
style: formatting fixes across multiple files

Whitespace and formatting cleanup from rustfmt:
- crash.rs: trailing space after blank lines removed
- buffer.rs: test uses explicit .clone() instead of implicit Copy
- mysql.rs: matches! pattern uses nested or (Some(&0x00 | &0xFE))
- tokio-compat runtime.rs: multi-line match arm formatting
- doctor_remediation_visual_regression.rs: iterator chain line-wrapped
- golden_outputs.rs: create_child_region calls reformatted
- multi_protocol_e2e.rs: create_child_region calls reformatted

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
